  • Verwendungen von Enemy in controller

    Methoden in controller, die Enemy zurückgeben
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    static Enemy[]
    GameController.getEnemies(Game game)
    Returns all enemies available in the game.
    static Enemy[]
    EncounterSystem.getEnemiesForBattle(Enemy[] enemyCodex)
    Creates a random group of enemies for a battle encounter.
    static Enemy[]
    EnemiesLoader.load()
    Loads all enemies from the serialized enemy data file.
    Methoden in controller mit Parametern vom Typ Enemy
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    static Enemy[]
    EncounterSystem.getEnemiesForBattle(Enemy[] enemyCodex)
    Creates a random group of enemies for a battle encounter.
    static int
    EnemyController.getHealth(Enemy enemy)
    Returns the current health value of the specified enemy.
    static String
    EnemyController.getImagepath(Enemy enemy)
    Returns the relative file path to the image representing the specified enemy.
    static int
    EnemyController.getMaxHealth(Enemy enemy)
    Returns the maximum health value of the specified enemy.

    Player.attack(Enemy enemy)

    Beschreibung
     
    Enemy(Enemy other)

    EnemyPanel.getEnemy()

    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung

    Creates an EnemyPanel for the specified enemy.
